title: Ominous Trial Key Advancement
description: This Datapack and Mod adds a new advancement for obtaining a Ominous Trial Key, translated into multiple languages (+20), compatible with version 1.21 to 26.1
body:
# Ominous Trial Key Advancement

**This DataPack and Mod** adds new advancement for obtaining a Ominous Trial Key, translated into multiple languages, compatible with version 1.21 to 26.1

![Ominous Trial Key Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcfd6703e82446b96bbb2067b6b901209bf2f5d8.png)
> **Advancement Labs © - 2026**

## Notas📝 (Notes)
- **Ominous Trial Key Advancement** is **compatible** with versions **1.21 to 26.1**🏷️
- **Ominous Trial Key Advancement** is compatible with any **functions and advancements Datapack in the World**
- **Ominous Trial Key Advancement** it has been translated into more than **20 Languages**
- **No** it is necessary to **unzip** the downloaded file 🗂️
